title: nasturtium sublyratum var. longicarpum
intro: Nasturtium sublyratum var. longicarpum, also known as Indian cress or long-fruited nasturtium, is a variety of the nasturtium plant, a flowering annual that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Nasturtium sublyratum var. longicarpum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also used as a garnish in salads and other dishes due to its peppery flavor and bright colors.
